final:
module eeprom_cell (
    input clk,
    input WE,
    input RE,
    input [3:0] D,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);
    reg [3:0] obf_memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (WE) begin
            obf_memory <= D; // Write data to obf_memory
        end
        if (RE) begin
            Q <= obf_memory; // Read data from obf_memory
        end
    end
endmodule
